reasoning: The control 4.2.1.1 is focused on ensuring SSL/TLS is used for load balancers in cloud environments. In Kubernetes, this maps to ensuring that Ingress resources and service meshes enforce TLS for secure communication. This can be achieved by configuring TLS in Ingress controllers and ensuring service meshes like Istio or Linkerd have TLS enforced.
title: Requirement 4.2.1.1
